content.rendered:
2024 Our Chinese New Year holiday will start on February 6, 2024, and we will come back work on February 18, 2024. Throughout the holiday period, our sales, technical support, and after-sales services will continue to be available for our customers. We express our sincere gratitude to our friends and customers for their trust, support, and assistance. Wishing everyone a joyful New Year, may all endeavors be successful, good health prevail, and may the world be blessed with peace, free from violence and conflict.

As the joyous occasion of the Chinese New Year approaches, Shanghai Npack extends warm wishes to its valued customers, friends, and associates. The company would like to inform all stakeholders that its Chinese New Year holiday is scheduled to commence on February 6, 2024, and normal operations will resume on February 18, 2024.

Even during this festive break, Shanghai Npack is committed to maintaining its unwavering support for clients. Throughout the holiday period, the sales, technical support, and after-sales services teams will remain available, ensuring that customers continue to receive the assistance they need. This dedication to customer service reflects Shanghai Npack’s commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

Shanghai Npack takes this opportunity to express heartfelt gratitude to its friends and customers for their trust, support, and assistance throughout the year. The company recognizes the importance of these relationships in its success and growth. The continuous support from customers has been instrumental in propelling Shanghai Npack to new heights in the liquid bottling equipment industry.

The company wishes everyone a joyful and prosperous New Year. May the coming year bring success and fulfillment in all endeavors. Shanghai Npack extends its sincere hopes for good health, prosperity, and happiness to all its stakeholders. The New Year represents a time for fresh beginnings, and Shanghai Npack is optimistic about the opportunities and challenges that lie ahead.

In the spirit of the Chinese New Year, Shanghai Npack also extends its wishes for global harmony. The company aspires to a world free from violence and conflict, where peace prevails, fostering a conducive environment for progress and collaboration. Shanghai Npack values its role not only as a leading provider of liquid bottling equipment but also as a responsible corporate citizen contributing to a positive and harmonious world.
